host: pgrx test pg16 (local NixOS dev worktree)
note: search_k pinned at 10, iterative_scan=off so the ONLY recall lever is oversample. recall@10 averaged over 8 query seeds; p50 is the median full-SPI round-trip latency per point (warm, after one warmup pass). The curve is what makes a VectorDBBench-style recall-vs-latency frontier honest: oversample turns the single (recall, latency) point of a fixed search_k into a tunable frontier comparable to HNSW's ef_search.
